# Metadata

This section summarizes the structure of the project output datasets, available at the U-Shift server at [https://ushift.tecnico.ulisboa.pt/content/impt/](https://ushift.tecnico.ulisboa.pt/content/impt/), and on the [GitHub releases](https://github.com/U-Shift/IMPT-data/releases).

| Dimension | Column name structure | Column name example |  Description | Unit | 
| ---- | ---- | ---- | ------------ | ---- |
|  | `id` |  | Geometry identifier (grid id, dtmnfr for parishes and dtmn for municipalities) | - |
| | `group_id` | | Group id (parish id for grid and municipality id for parishes) | - |
|  | `name` | | Geometry name (grid id or parish/municipality name) | - |
|  | `region_id` |  | NUTS 2 code | - | 
|  | `IMPT_{method}_{mode¹}` | `IMPT_score_pca_geom_walk` | IMPT Index | % |
|  | `{dimension}_Index_{mode¹}` | `Accessibility_Index` | PCA result for dimension metrics aggregation | % |
| Accessibility | `access_{poi_type}_{time}_{census_gp²}_{mode¹}` | `access_health_60min_residents_walk` | Number of opportunities reachable within time | # |
| Accessibility | `pois_n_{poi_type}` | `pois_n_health` | Number of points of interest for a category | # |
| Accessibility | `access_gap_{time/money}_{mode¹}` | `access_gap_time_pt` | Accessibility gaps metrics | min, € |
| Mobility | `mobility_cost_{poi_type}_n{closest}_{census_gp²}_{mode¹}` | `mobility_cost_health_n1_residents_walk` | Travel cost/time to closest opportunities | min |
| Mobility | `mobility_commuting_avg_tt_{mode¹}` | `mobility_commuting_avg_tt_bike` | Commuting average travel times | min |
| Mobility | `mobility_commuting_trips` | | Number of commuting trips | # |
| Mobility | `mobility_commuting_mean_transfers_pt` | | Average number of transfers on public transport per commuting trip | # |
| Mobility | `mobility_commuting_{weighted_headway/weighted_waiting_time/total_frequency}_{period}_pt` | `mobility_weighted_waiting_time_peak_pt` | Public transit service provision metrics (headway, frequency, wait time) | min, # |
| Mobility | `mobility_n_stops_pt` | - | Number of public transport stops | # |
| Mobility | `mobility_frequency_ratio_peak_{period}_pt` | `mobility_frequency_reduction_weekend_pt` | Ratio of public transport frequency during period, compared to peak hour | % |
| Mobility | `mobility_stop_coverage_{pop/pct}_{mode¹}` | `mobility_stop_coverage_pct_bus_pt` | Public transit stop coverage | %, # |
| Mobility | `mobility_shared_mobility_points` | | Number of shared mobility points available | # |
| Mobility | `mobility_infrastructure_{indicator}_{mode¹}` | `mobility_infrastructure_length_bike` | Mobility infrastructure metrics (length, area, ratios) | m, ha, % |
| Mobility | `modal_census_share_{mode¹}` | `modal_census_share_pt` | Modal share from Census | %, # |
| Mobility | `modal_imob_share_{mode¹}` | `modal_imob_share_car` | Modal share from IMOB data | %, # |
| Affordability | `afforability_total_money_{mode¹}` | `affordability_total_money_car` | Total cost of transport | € |
| Affordability | `afforability_avg_{tt/distance}_{mode¹}` | affordability_avg_distance_car | Average travel time/distance for commuting trips | min, km |
| Affordability | `affordability_trips_{mode¹}` | affordability_trips_car | Number of commuting trips | # |
| Affordability | `affordability_{h_transp/transp}_inc_comp_{mode¹}` | affordability_transp_inc_comp_pass | Transport (+ housing) burdern | % | 
| Safety | `safety{_inner³}_{victim_type}30` | safety_feridos_ligeiros30 | Number of victims of road accidents in 30 days | # |
| Safety | `safety{_inner³}_indice_gravidade_{mode¹}` |  safety_indice_gravidade_bike | Road accident severity index for mode of transport | % |
| Safety | `safety{_inner³}_veh_{mode¹}` | `safety_veh_car` | Number of vehicles involved in road accidents | # |
| Safety | `safety{_inner³}_acidentes_per_1000res` | | Number of road accidents per 1000 residents | # |
| Safety | `safety{_inner³}_vitimas_mortais30_per_1000res` | | Number of fatalities from road accidents per 1000 residents | # |
| Census & Land Use | `census_{income/landuse}_{indicator}` | `census_income_gini_coef` | Census socioeconomic and land use data | Multiple |


**Notes:**

¹ When the mode is not specified, the index is computed for all modes combined.

² Computations were performed at the grid level, so aggregation by population was only computed for parish and municipality scales.

³ When `inner` is present, the indicator applies for inner areas of the region, exclusing highways and high speed roads. When not present, all the road network is considered.
